name: Ground Beef with Zucchini and Tomato
recipeIngredient: 2 small Zucchini, peeled and sliced diagonally
1 1/2 tbsp Corn starch, dissolved in 1/3 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, onion, soya sauce, and salt together. Peel and slice zucchini. Cut tomatoes.
2. Heat oil in a wok to smoking point. Stir fry the ground beef mixture until browned, about 2-3 minutes of cooking time. Add zucchini and 1/2 cup of water, stir ingredients. Cover the wok with a lid and cook for 5 minutes, lifting the wok cover 2 or 3 times to stir the mixture. Add tomatoes and sugar, cover, and cook for 2 or 3 more minutes.
3. Uncover and stir the corn starch solution thoroughly. Pour it into the wok, stirring to form a gravy.
NOTE: Chicken, pork, or shrimp could be substituted for ground beef.
